function.name: obsidian_read
function.description: Reads the content of a note from the Obsidian vault by its vault-relative path. Returns the note's markdown content, frontmatter, tags, and filesystem metadata.

path.description: Vault-relative path to the note, e.g. 'projects/my-note.md'

function.name: obsidian_write
function.description: Creates a new note or overwrites an existing one in the Obsidian vault by its vault-relative path. Content is markdown.

content.description: Full markdown content to write to the file.

function.name: obsidian_append
function.description: Appends content to the end of an existing note in the Obsidian vault. If the file doesn't exist, it is created first.

function.name: obsidian_search
function.description: Full-text search across all notes in the Obsidian vault. Returns a list of matching file paths with content snippets.

function.name: obsidian_list
function.description: Lists all files and subdirectories inside a vault directory. Use '/' for root or a subdirectory path like 'projects/'.

path.description: Vault-relative directory path, e.g. 'projects' or '' for root. Defaults to root.

function.name: obsidian_open
function.description: Opens a file in the Obsidian editor UI by its vault-relative path.

path.description: Vault-relative path to the file to open.
